system.description: A second identity is not a wig and a bad accent — it's history, paper, a credit footprint, a regular barista. You maintain one in parallel to your real life, and pulling it apart is not a casual exercise even for authorities who know to look.
system.effect: Maintain a second identity. Authorities need a Hard check (DC 16) to pierce it.

wizard.tagline: History, paper, and a regular barista
